name: mouse_l1md_line1
description: L1Md: the mouse-specific lineage of LINE-1 long interspersed nuclear elements. Full-length L1Md is ~7 kb (5' UTR + ORF1 + ORF2 + 3' UTR + poly-A tail); most copies are 5'-truncated. ~600,000 L1-related copies in mouse, ~3000 of which are full-length and potentially active. Active L1Md subfamilies include L1Md_A, L1Md_T (the youngest, currently most active), and L1Md_Gf. L1 activity is substantially higher in mouse than in human, producing more de-novo insertions per generation.
